sentences.arabic: اعْتَذَرَ مَاجِدٌ عَنْ خَطَأٍ ارْتَكَبَهُ مَعَ صَدِيقِهِ.
sentences.translation: Majid se izvinio za grešku koju je napravio prema prijatelju.
sentences.translationEn: Majid apologised for a mistake he had made with his friend.

sentences.translation: Izvinjenje je bilo teško ali ga je ipak izrekao.
sentences.translationEn: The apology was difficult but he did it.

sentences.translation: Prijatelj je prihvatio izvinjenje i prijateljstvo se obnovilo.
sentences.translationEn: The friend accepted the apology and the friendship returned.

sentences.arabic: الاعْتِذَارُ يَجْعَلُ الْقَلْبَ أَخَفَّ وَالْعَلَاقَةَ أَقْوَى.
sentences.translation: Izvinjenje čini srce lakšim a odnos jačim.
sentences.translationEn: An apology makes the heart lighter and the relationship stronger.
